item.title: Proclamation by the President on National Angel Family Day, 2026
item.description: The proclamation designates National Angel Family Day for 2026 and memorializes American lives affected by crimes linked to illegal border crossings and the illicit drugs alleged to be trafficked across the border. It acknowledges the Angel Families and expresses ongoing support for families who have lost loved ones, noting the impact on communities and inviting observance of the day. Disclaimer: This content is AI generated. Use at your own risk. Please consult the original articles for accurate information.

item.title: Nominations Sent to the Senate for U.S. Attorney for the District of Nevada, Assistant Secretary of State for Educational and Cultural Affairs, and Assistant Secretary of the Interior
item.description: The White House announced nominations sent to the Senate for confirmation. George Kelesis, of Nevada, is nominated to be United States Attorney for the District of Nevada for a four-year term, to succeed Jason M. Frierson. Catherine Dillon, of Maryland, is nominated to be Assistant Secretary of State for Educational and Cultural Affairs, to succeed Lee Satterfield, who resigned. William Hague, of Washington, is nominated to be Assistant Secretary of the Interior. This release constitutes part of the administration's nominations sent to the Senate for consideration. Disclaimer: This content is AI generated. Use at your own risk. Please consult the original articles for accurate information.

item.title: Strengthening United States National Defense Through a Resilient Power Grid and Clean Coal Power Generation Fleet
item.description: The action focuses on ensuring the United States electric grid remains resilient and reliable to support military installations, operations, and defense-industrial production. It aims to reduce dependence on intermittent energy sources by promoting stable baseload power, with a role for clean coal power generation as part of the strategy. The grid is described as foundational to national defense and economic stability, and the proposal outlines measures to prevent prolonged disruptions to energy supply that could affect national security and defense readiness. Disclaimer: This content is AI generated. Use at your own risk. Please consult the original articles for accurate information.
